conversations.title: Create durable intake pipeline
messages: Map the architecture first: source form, parser, validation schema, review queue, database storage, and delivery step.
Add a human approval gate before any external email is sent.
Make the workflow portable across Claude, Codex, ChatGPT, and Zo by preserving the pipeline primitives instead of product-specific prompts.
Create a CLI tool with --help, write a regression fixture, and store every run in a history database.
When the first run fails, inspect the traceback, form a hypothesis, patch the parser, and re-run only the failing stage.
After validation passes, write an AAR that captures the error, fix, guardrail, and next improvement.
